creator: bsd@orsolic.org
text:
I am experiencing same crash.

Same system was stable (60 days of uptime) on 14.2-RELEASE and then I upgraded it to 14.2-p2 and rebooted.
It is not related to the system upgrade because rebooting in old BE now results in crash after 1 hour of uptime.
Same crash with drm-515 and drm-61.
If system is left without kldloaded drm it will not crash for days. RAM test doesn't show errors after multiple hours of running. Nothing HW wise is changed on the PC for the last few months.
Crash is reproducible (open Firefox, play music/video on YouTube and wait few hours)
My GPU is integrated into the AMD Ryzen 4750G CPU.

Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
